title: Sanji Pushes Luffy Away
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Reiju, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Nami as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji tries to protect the crew by rejecting Luffy, but Luffy refuses to accept a false goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop! That's enough! You win, Sanji! We'll leave!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're nice and an amazing chef...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: His attack power is off the charts!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's just proof he's got that Vinsmoke blood running through his veins...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's the fiery type! I'm so into that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I beg you forgive me for my heavy-handed approach...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems like you've finally severed your useless bonds...

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: You ain't gettin' off that easy, Sanjiii!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never heard you say anything so fake and forced!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You really think that's gonna be enough to get rid of me? That's gonna be enough to make me turn my back on you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You of all people should know better !!

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 28 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
